name: fan-out-and-gate-corridor

rooms._note: the wave: N independent work items run in parallel as cheap-tier (sonnet) leaves — RFC #35 args.items, Kahn-wave scheduled

_budget_note: Wave-aware sizing (sprint-compose-speed S1): tool_calls bumped 50->120 to cover ~N parallel sonnet leaves in the fan-out room plus the single opus gate; wall_s unchanged (leaves run concurrently, so parallelism does not extend wall-clock). Tune against the S3 A/B benchmark.
